main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling lead elements por phytoplankton bloom + TEP + organic'.

key_signals.justification: Conecta ΔP cabeza + TOC + TEP + clorofila + bloom.

recommended_action.justification: CIP dos pasos: alcalino NaOH+Na-DSS 60 min + ácido HCl 0.2% — protocolo completo, sin oxidantes a RO.

requested_data.justification: Pide ATP feed — discriminador bio pero no el trigger gold (taxonomía/autopsia FTIR).
